title: Ball Demon applies Atk plus two while equipped

card.rawText: Inflict 2 damage to your opponent's primary creature at the end of your turn. Atk: +2.

plan.title: Ball Demon applies Atk plus two while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Ball Demon to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify its Atk damage gains +2.

notes: Use a modifier-zero, one-attack-die creature so the +2 Atk bonus is isolated.

steps: Player 1 equips Ball Demon to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +2 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the separate end-turn 2 damage effect is covered independently from the Atk bonus.
riskNotes: The deterministic damage roll is 1; the equipped Atk +2 bonus makes the first strike deal 3.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Ball Demon equipped Atk bonus.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
